/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/log_cli.dir/src/main.cpp.o  -o log_cli  ../log_agent/liblog_agent.a ../log_service/liblog_service.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../log_writer/liblog_writer.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.5.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so
